message:
Add path traversal guards to EditTool and WriteTool

Both EditTool and WriteTool now validate that the resolved absolute path
falls within the canonical working directory before proceeding. This
prevents directory traversal attacks where crafted relative paths
(../../etc/passwd) could escape the sandbox.

The check canonicalizes both the target path and the CWD, then verifies
starts_with(). On failure, returns a validation error with both paths
for debuggability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
